Meta.Title: 5-Day Weight Loss Meal Plan (No Restrictions)
Meta.Summary: A 5-day, high-protein, high-fiber meal plan designed to support gradual fat loss from 80 kg toward 65 kg. Each day targets roughly 1500-1700 kcal with 110-140 g protein, emphasizing minimally processed foods, vegetables, and steady meal timing. Adjust portions up or down based on hunger, activity, and progress.

Guidelines.Hydration: Drink 2.0-3.0 L water daily. Add 1-2 extra glasses around workouts.

CookingDefaults.Item: Use 1-2 tsp olive oil per meal unless otherwise specified.
Prefer whole grains and legumes for carbs.
Use herbs, spices, vinegar, lemon, mustard, salsa for flavor.

PortionAdjustment.Rule: If weight loss is less than about 0.25-0.75 kg/week over 2-3 weeks, reduce daily carbs/fats slightly (e.g., remove 1 snack or halve a starch portion).
If energy is too low or workouts suffer, add 150-250 kcal/day via fruit, yogurt, or extra lean protein.

Breakfast.Meal: Greek yogurt bowl: 250 g plain nonfat Greek yogurt, 40 g oats, 150 g berries, 10 g chia seeds, cinnamon.

Lunch.Meal: Chicken quinoa salad: 160 g cooked chicken breast, 120 g cooked quinoa, mixed greens, cucumber, tomatoes, 30 g feta, lemon-olive oil dressing (2 tsp oil).

Dinner.Meal: Salmon plate: 160 g salmon, 300 g roasted mixed vegetables (broccoli, zucchini, peppers), 200 g baked potato, side salad with vinegar.

OptionalSnack.Meal: If hungry: 200 ml skim milk or 150 g cottage cheese.

Breakfast.Meal: Veggie omelet: 2 whole eggs plus 200 g egg whites, spinach/mushrooms/onion, 1 slice whole-grain toast, 1 orange.

Lunch.Meal: Tuna wrap: 1 large whole-wheat tortilla, 1 can tuna in water (drained), 1 tbsp light mayo or Greek yogurt, celery/onion, lettuce, tomato. Add a side of carrot sticks.

Snack.Meal: Protein shake (25-30 g protein) blended with water and 1 banana.

Dinner.Meal: Turkey chili: 180 g lean ground turkey (cooked), beans (150 g cooked), tomatoes, peppers, spices. Serve with 120 g cooked brown rice and a large side salad.

OptionalSnack.Meal: If hungry: 200 g berries or 1 kiwi.

Breakfast.Meal: Overnight oats: 50 g oats, 250 ml skim milk, 25 g whey protein (or 200 g yogurt), 1 tbsp peanut butter (15 g), 1/2 sliced banana, cinnamon.

Lunch.Meal: Lean beef bowl: 160 g cooked lean beef, 250-300 g steamed vegetables, 150 g cooked sweet potato, salsa or low-sugar sauce.

Snack.Meal: 200 g cottage cheese plus 150 g pineapple (or any fruit).

Dinner.Meal: Stir-fry: 180 g chicken or tofu, 400 g mixed stir-fry vegetables, 120 g cooked jasmine/basmati rice, soy sauce/ginger/garlic. Use 2 tsp oil for cooking.

OptionalSnack.Meal: If hungry: herbal tea and 1 rice cake or 1 small piece of fruit.

Breakfast.Meal: Smoothie: 300 ml low-fat milk, 30 g protein powder, 200 g frozen berries, 30 g oats, 10 g flaxseed.

Lunch.Meal: Mediterranean plate: 160 g grilled chicken, 120 g cooked couscous or bulgur, large Greek salad (tomato, cucumber, onion, olives), 2 tbsp hummus.

Dinner.Meal: White fish tacos: 180 g cod/tilapia, cabbage slaw, salsa, 2-3 corn tortillas. Side: 200 g roasted vegetables or black beans (150 g cooked).

OptionalSnack.Meal: If hungry: 150 g Greek yogurt with cinnamon.

Breakfast.Meal: High-protein toast: 2 slices whole-grain toast, 150 g cottage cheese, sliced tomato, salt/pepper. Add 1 piece of fruit (apple or berries).

Lunch.Meal: Soup and salad: lentil soup (350-450 g) plus mixed salad with 120 g cooked chicken or 1 can tuna, vinegar dressing, and 1 small whole-grain roll.

Snack.Meal: Veg and dip: 250 g mixed raw vegetables (cucumber, carrots, peppers) plus 60 g hummus.

Dinner.Meal: Chicken pasta: 160-180 g cooked chicken breast, 75 g dry whole-wheat pasta (cooked), marinara sauce, spinach, mushrooms. Side salad.

OptionalSnack.Meal: If hungry: 200 ml skim milk or 1 small yogurt.

Category.name: FruitsAndVegetables
Category.Item: Apples, pears, oranges, kiwi, pineapple (as preferred)

Category.name: FatsAndFlavor
Category.Item: Salsa, marinara, soy sauce, vinegar, lemons
